channel.title: Knowledge-Work on Sinclair Huang, HEC Liège, Executive DBA
channel.description: Recent content in Knowledge-Work on Sinclair Huang, HEC Liège, Executive DBA

item.title: When AI Scales Knowledge, Humanity Becomes the Bottleneck
item.description: ** In a world of infinite content and scalable intelligence, the scarcest resource may no longer be intelligence itself — but the ability to truly see another human being, and to be seen in return.***
